description_long: This is a rectangular, modern wooden shelving unit with a smooth, natural wood grain finish. The structure features two open horizontal shelves, supported on one side by two vertical white columns, which add a subtle contrast to the overall design. The front and back faces are solid panels, while the sides reveal the open shelving and support columns. The shelves are deep and spacious, suitable for storing books, decorative items, or small equipment. The overall appearance is minimalist, with no visible handles, doors, or decorative embellishments. The construction appears sturdy, making it suitable for use in urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or public lounges.
description: A modern, rectangular wooden shelving unit with two open shelves and white vertical supports on one side. The design is minimalist and sturdy, with a smooth wood grain finish.
description_view_0: The front view shows a solid wood panel with an open shelf beneath the top surface, revealing the depth and spaciousness of the shelving.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the two open shelves and the two white vertical support columns, highlighting the open structure.
description_view_2: The back view mirrors the front, with a solid wood panel and open shelving, but the white support columns are more visible.
description_view_3: The right side view shows a solid wood panel with no visible openings or supports, emphasizing the closed side of the unit.
